title: The Three Elements
content:
They come as couriers of Heaven: their feet
    Sonorous-sandalled with majestic awe;
    In raiment of swift foam and wind and heat,
    Blowing the trumpets of God's wrath and law.
meaning:
"The Three Elements" is a quintessential example of Madison Julius Cawein's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
